content: Failed trajectories, which are typically discarded or underutilized in exploration, contain exactly the high-uncertainty samples that uncertainty-based memory selection prioritizes for deep active agents. We can reframe failed exploration attempts as a naturally curated source of informative memory samples, rather than labeling them as valueless output from unproductive exploration.
source_topics: Uncertainty-based memory sample selection for deep active agents
Self-supervised exploration strategy improvement from failed trajectories
trigger_topic: Uncertainty-based memory sample selection for deep active agents
